---
name: Content / feature
about: Suggest a content change or feature

---

**What and why**

Describe the content change or feature and the value it adds.

**For content changes**

- [ ] Impact-first (Problem → Action → Impact)
- [ ] All four `RichText` variants (EN/ID × Plain/Tech) considered
- [ ] No fabricated metrics
